description: REQ-007 specifies 'The file path is {vaultPath}/{noteId}.md'. pipeline.ts line 121 implements this as template literal interpolation. No test asserts the constructed path value. All test mocks for writeFileAtomic ignore the path argument (e.g., step3 test makePorts line 91: 'writeFileAtomic: () => writeResult'). A test should verify the path is correctly constructed, especially for noteId values containing special characters or path separators.
